title: Eidolon: Self-Improvement Soul for Hermes Agent
description: Eidolon is the self-improvement layer for Hermes Agent. It installs loud, degrades loud, and never silently no-ops. Provides a CLI (doctor, report, rollback) plus a provider-agnostic inference router that reasons over capability tiers rather than hardcoded model names. Designed to be the default self-improvement layer for the Hermes Agent ecosystem.
